overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a paint horse through a scenic wilderness. The clip begins in a grassy meadow near water, transitions onto a rocky mountain trail, and features a companion rider joining the journey toward a large rock formation topped with a wooden structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow at forest edge near water

agents.ego_description: riding a black and white paint horse at a steady trot through tall grass near a lake

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees forming a dense forest boundary
calm reflective water visible through the trees on the left side
lush green tall grass covering the ground
distant mountain peaks with rocky outcroppings under blue sky
weathered wooden posts marking a boundary line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a peaceful ride through a grassy meadow at the edge of a pine forest. A lake is visible to the left while distant mountains rise ahead. The horse moves steadily through the tall green grass on a clear summer day.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with scattered boulders

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy meadow to rocky dirt trail as the path ascends

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill on the horse along a narrow rocky path winding through pine trees

entered.detail: narrow trail composed of packed dirt and loose stones
massive gray boulder formation rising beside the trail
various sized rocks littering the ground beside the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a rocky mountain trail as the grass gives way to dirt and stone. Large rock formations appear on the right while the path continues winding uphill through scattered pine trees. The lake and meadow fade from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to large outcropping with wooden tower

events.description: second rider on a brown horse joins from the left and rides alongside

agents.ego_description: riding alongside a companion on a brown horse, following them toward a large rock formation ahead

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse joining from the left and moving ahead on the trail

entered.detail: tall wooden pole or lookout tower perched atop the large rock formation

segments.scene_description: A companion rider joins from the left, riding a brown horse alongside the player before moving ahead. Together they approach a massive rock formation that dominates the view ahead, topped with a distinctive wooden tower structure. The trail remains rocky as they travel deeper into the mountainous terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that begins in a lush, peaceful meadow and ascends into a rugged, mountainous wilderness. It begins with a steady ride through tall green grass at the edge of a pine forest, with a calm lake to the left and distant peaks on the horizon. As the horse moves forward, the terrain shifts from soft greenery to a winding trail of dirt and stone, causing the meadow and lake to fade from view as the path climbs uphill past scattered pines and large rock formations. The scene then expands as a companion rider on a brown horse joins from the left, riding alongside before leading the way deeper into the rocky highlands. Finally, the camera tracks the pair as they approach a massive, dominating rock formation topped with a distinctive wooden tower structure.
